# Proxycurl — Pricing

## Monthly Subscription Plans (via RapidAPI)

| Plan | Monthly | Credits/Month | Per-Credit Overage |
|------|---------|---------------|--------------------|
| **Basic** | Free | 10 | $0.025 |
| **Pro** | $59 | 2,500 | $0.025 |
| **Ultra** | $359 | 25,000 | $0.015 |
| **Mega** | $1,099 | 89,900 | $0.012 |

## Direct Subscription (from Nubela)

- **Annual Plans**: From $49/mo with 2,500 monthly credits
- **Pay-As-You-Go**: $10 for 100 credits (one-time, never expire; base rate ~$0.01/credit)
- **LinkDB Datasets**: From $3,000 (one-time purchase for bulk datasets)
- **Enterprise**: From $2,000/mo (18-month minimum commitment, volume discounts available)

## Pricing per API Call

- **Per-API cost**: As low as $0.009/call on the largest subscription tier

## Credit / Usage Model

- 1 credit = 1 API call; exact cost depends on endpoint:
  - LinkedIn Person Profile: ~1–3 credits
  - LinkedIn Company Profile: ~1 credit
  - Email lookup (person): ~1–3 credits
  - Bulk/batch endpoints available for higher efficiency
- Credits do not expire on paid plans
- PAYG available — no monthly commitment needed for low-volume use

## TCO Notes

- Proxycurl is the leading developer-friendly API for LinkedIn profile scraping; designed for programmatic pipelines not browser extensions
- Ideal for automation workflows (n8n, Python scripts) where structured LinkedIn data is needed at scale
- Email data quality is moderate — pairs well with a dedicated email verifier (MillionVerifier, ZeroBounce)
- PAYG model is cost-efficient for irregular or exploratory use; subscription tiers suit continuous pipelines
